creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
> Please try do deinstall the old opencv port first (see UPDATING).


# pkg_info -E opencv\*
opencv-core-2.3.0.r




# cd /usr/ports/graphics/opencv

/usr/ports/graphics/opencv# make clean
